channel.title: Emerald Pointe – Tide & Wind Conditions
channel.description: Daily marine forecast with tide & wind info for Punta Gorda

item.title: Marine Conditions for Thursday, June 04
item.description: 🌊 High Tide: 08:56 AM (1.202 ft) ··· 🌊 Low Tide: 01:18 AM (-0.145 ft) ··· 💨 Wind: E 13 G 22 mph
